destinations.evidence: Fulfilled async annotation assigns the same spc_calls vector to Legacy, Eip1559, Scheduled, Passkey, and AsyncSettlement variants.

equivalence_argument: Mapped in the port fulfilled-async preparation: Passkey receives the same SPC call vector as the other supported original transaction variants.
rationale: No later packet candidate changes this compatibility rule for passkey transactions receiving fulfilled async SPC calls.
statement: When payload building injects SPC calls for fulfilled async execution, Transaction::Passkey must receive the same spc_calls vector as legacy, EIP-1559, and scheduled transaction variants.
suggested_falsification_tests: Construct a fulfilled async Passkey original and assert prepared.original_tx.spc_calls() contains the injected SPC call.
Run the same fulfilled async annotation fixture for Legacy, Eip1559, Scheduled, and Passkey and assert identical SPC vector contents.
summary: Passkey fulfilled async SPC propagation is mapped in the port.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Fulfilled async settlement fixture with Passkey original should expose spc_calls to async_context.pending_spc_calls during payload execution.
title: Passkey transactions carry fulfilled async SPC calls
